shows.blurb: Dave Attell headlines with his grimy crowd-work mastery—worth the front row. The rest of the bill leans more mainstream/TV-polished than the Cellar regulars you love.

shows.blurb: Ian Fidance brings alt-comedy chaos and Greer Barnes closes strong, but the middle feels a bit uneven. Solid Wednesday late show, not essential.
